data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Travel time between appointments', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions travel time but does not provide specific data or endpoints that validate this aspect. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming travel time between appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
